task_completion.description: Locate the target security incident in the application

task_completion.description: Update the incident classification to Denial of Service
task_completion.visual_evidence: The classification field in the form is set to 'Denial of Service'.

A success message or the updated incident details view showing the new classification ('Denial of Service'), severity ('High'), and owner ('admin') applied to the record.
